case_title: JACQUELINE DELORES WATSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WATSON, JACQUELINE DELORES

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-25-2020 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE WATSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-14-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: PLAINTIFF FILED A REQUEST FOR RE-HEARING ON WAIVER OF COURT FEES ON 11/30/20. (206)

FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE DELORES WATSON IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
